title: Convert app idea into Lovable build spec
goal: Turn rough product notes into a clean prompt with architecture, pages, components, and seed data expectations.

title: Generate PRD from founder notes
goal: Create a product requirements document from messy brainstorming notes and feature bullets.

title: Turn rough feature list into clean user stories
goal: Rewrite a feature list as user stories, acceptance criteria, and implementation notes.

title: Create a production-grade README
goal: Generate a README with setup, architecture, usage, deployment, and contribution sections.

title: Generate component architecture from app scope
goal: Extract reusable UI and data components from a product description.

title: Convert API docs into frontend task list
goal: Transform backend API docs into actionable frontend implementation tasks.

title: Produce onboarding guide from repo structure
goal: Create a developer onboarding guide from a repository tree and key files.

title: Generate debugging checklist for failed endpoint
goal: Turn a failing endpoint description into a stepwise diagnostic checklist.

title: Create UX copy for SaaS dashboard
goal: Generate labels, empty states, CTA text, and microcopy for a dashboard.

title: Generate seed data for community platform
goal: Create realistic sample content, categories, tags, and metadata for a community app.

title: Convert knowledge base into searchable taxonomy
goal: Organize knowledge into categories, tags, and filterable content buckets.

title: Turn a GitHub repo into learning roadmap
goal: Build a learning plan from repo structure, examples, and implementation difficulty.

title: Create architecture decision record draft
goal: Generate an ADR with context, options, decision, consequences, and alternatives.

title: Generate QA scenarios from user flow
goal: Write test scenarios from a journey, including edge cases and success criteria.

title: Produce Claude prompt chain for research workflow
goal: Build a multi-step prompting chain for structured research and synthesis.

title: Build content model for prompts library
goal: Design fields, relations, and taxonomy for a prompt catalog.

title: Create contribution guidelines from product goals
goal: Draft community contribution rules aligned to product intent and quality.

title: Turn meeting notes into execution plan
goal: Convert raw meeting notes into priorities, owners, milestones, and next actions.

title: Generate release notes from merged changes
goal: Summarize a set of code changes into user-facing and technical release notes.

title: Convert rough markdown into polished docs page
goal: Rewrite unstructured markdown into a clean documentation page.

title: Create issue templates for engineering teams
goal: Generate issue templates for bugs, features, chores, and research.

title: Turn support tickets into product insights
goal: Cluster support issues into themes, root causes, and product opportunities.

title: Create landing page copy from product spec
goal: Translate a product spec into conversion-focused landing page copy.

title: Generate stack comparison matrix
goal: Compare multiple tech stacks across speed, cost, scalability, and complexity.

title: Turn a workflow into step-by-step playbook
goal: Convert a repeated process into a structured playbook.

title: Draft internal tool admin copy
goal: Create concise labels, help text, and admin-facing messages.

title: Generate data schema from content types
goal: Turn content requirements into a relational data model.

title: Rewrite long docs into scannable summary cards
goal: Condense verbose docs into short structured cards.

title: Create community moderation policy text
goal: Draft lightweight moderation copy for submissions and comments.

title: Generate prompt evaluation rubric
goal: Define criteria to score outputs from AI prompts consistently.

title: Create SEO metadata from content library
goal: Generate titles, descriptions, and social preview text.
